attributes.action: Bring back mortgage relief for landlords on rental properties.
attributes.additional_details: Help landlords and tenants, Labour's policies don't work; they made it completely stupid. All for helping good tenants find good landlords. They pushed out both, bringing back tax relief on mortgages for landlords, which would help more properties return to the rental market. Stop giving corporations the advantages. Allow landlords time to find new tenants without the council tax for 3 months.
attributes.background: Labour's policies don't work; they made it completely unworkable. All for helping good tenants find good landlords. They pushed out both, bringing back tax relief on mortgages for landlords, which would help more properties return to the rental market. Stop giving corporations the advantages.

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly what type or amount of mortgage tax relief you'd like the Government or Parliament to provide to landlords.

You could start a new petition explaining clearly the type and amount of mortgage tax relief you would like the Government or Parliament to provide to landlords.
